pageProps.aboutContent:
I am an eccentric, diligent, and curious guy with immense love for Computer Science and Physics. 

#### Education
I am a student at International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad studying BTech CS and MS by Research in Computational Science. I am currenly in 3rd year of the college.


#### Current Interests
I am interested in modern research especially in the cross-disciplinary fields of Computer Science. I am currently involved in research in Computational Physics, but I do dip my toes once in a while into other fileds like Computer Vision and Information Retrival. 


Besides this, I am also interested in statistical modelling and analysis. I have undertaken a few projects in the past and currently I am looking into epidemiology.

blogContent.byline: I share my experience of making this website through React + Nextjs. I try to discuss my learnings and issues that I encountered.

pageProps.contactContent:
I am currently looking for research opportunities. I am involved in research in Computational Physics. Besides that I am also interested in Computer Vision, ML Data Analysis, and in software design. Besides those, I am always interested in gaining new experience and learning, so hit me up if you want to share something with me.

My contact email is : `jai.bardhan@research.iiit.ac.in`
